app.title: Better Diagrams as Code to Image
app.description: A powerful tool to render Mermaid and PlantUML code in real-time and export them as high-quality images.

export.copyJpgAsPng: Image copied to clipboard in PNG format! (Clipboard does not support JPG)
export.copyWarning: Clipboard copy will be forced to PNG format

engine.label: Rendering Engine:
engine.plantumlWarning: (This engine sends code to an external server for processing. Do NOT enter sensitive information.)

samples.mermaid:
graph TD
  A[Start] --> B{Is it raining?}
  B -->|Yes| C[Take Umbrella]
  B -->|No| D[No Umbrella]
